Site Navigation

Boards & Guides

Announcements News & Updates
Official rule changes, new Part openings, and updates from the moderation team.
Event Announcements GM-Run Events
Special events, seasonal arcs, and community activities curated by the Game Master team.
Terms of Service Community Standards
Conduct, RP standards, content policy and moderation. Read before participating.
D&D Mechanics Combat Resolution
How dice rolls, stat grades, DCs and Stand abilities are resolved in combat and skill checks.
Stand Overview Power System Guide
Stand types, six stat parameters, creation rules, and how to submit your Stand for GM approval.
Requiem The Highest Evolution
The rarest Stand evolution. Requires narrative achievement and full GM Council approval.
Beyond! Transcendence
A metaphysical force from JoJolion — the universe guiding a protagonist. Earned, never claimed.
Hamon The Ripple Technique
Solar energy through breath. The most accessible starting ability — no special approval needed.
Spin The Golden Rotation
Rotational force aligned with the Golden Ratio. Rarer than Hamon, can interact with Stands.

Game Master Curated

Part Boards

🎩

Part boards are created and managed by Game Masters. Each Part is a custom story arc set in its own era, location, and tone. Players join a Part to participate in that arc. GMs control which Parts are open for new characters. There are no canon Parts — every arc is original.

🎩

No parts open yet.
Game Masters create boards from the GM panel.

A JoJo Roleplay

奇妙な冒険 — Fan-made community · Not affiliated with Hirohiko Araki or Shueisha

Frontend Alpha · Supabase & Cloudflare integration pending

Create Your Character
1Identity
2Ability
3Story

You must be registered and signed in to submit a character.

Sign In / Register →
01 Who are they?

Boards are created by GMs. Check announcements for open Parts.

Non-Human races require GM approval. See Races on the D&D page.

Link to an image — art, faceclaim, or description sketch. Not required.

02 What can they do?

Not every character needs a supernatural power — humans are fully viable. Ability types follow the JoJo D&D system. Some require GM review or approval before use in combat threads.

⚪

Human — no power

☀️ Hamon Details
🌀 Spin Details
Spin requires GM review before use in combat threads.
✦ Stand Sheet
Stands require separate GM approval. Your character can RP while their Stand is pending review.

Not sure? See Stand Types on the D&D page.

Stand Parameters Max 2 A grades · Each A offset by a D or E · S = GM approval only · Stat guide ↗
🩸 Vampire Details
Vampire characters require explicit GM approval and must fit the Part's timeline.
🏛 Pillar Man
Pillar Man slots are extremely rare. Submitting this opens a conversation with the GM Council — it is not a guarantee of approval.
03 What's their story?

Directly from JoJo D&D — your character's lifestyle and how they see the world. Informs RP tone, not mechanics.

✦ Stand Registration
Stands are reviewed by GMs before approval. Your character can participate in non-combat threads while your Stand is pending. Combat threads require an approved Stand.

See Stand Types on the D&D page for descriptions and canon examples.

Stand Stats

Max 2× A. Every A requires a D/E elsewhere.
